reviews.review_description: I can get to start this game. Need a refund...

developer_response.body: what exactly is the problem, do you not have a game controller?

reviews.review_description: It's basically Pilot Wings in VR. What else do you want?
This game is really fun to play. Love it.
I try and play and says I need a controller to play , which I have, I restart no play I reinstalled no play. I'd like my money back

developer_response.body: Hi, Sorry you are having trouble, which controller do you have?

reviews.review_description: really enjoy game and experience of flight.  thank you.

reviews.review_title: Nice looking flight sim for the Go
reviews.review_description:
With a microlight, a helicopter and a parachute you get to explore four small islands. The scenery is pretty good if a little sparse and the various activities (flying microlights and helicopters, parachuting and parascending) give you a good tour of the various locales.

It needs a gamepad controller to use this title. Using a gamepad works well but the controls are not as smooth as the Go's VR controller.

Well worth the cost and a lot of fun. I would have liked a more spirited airoplane than the microlight but the helicopter is an interesting alternative.
